title: ziziphora aragonensis
intro: Ziziphora aragonensis, also known as the Aragonese dragon's head, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of compounds like camphor and borneol. The health benefits of Ziziphora aragonensis include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic for minor wounds. Herbal preparations of Ziziphora aragonensis can be made into teas, tinctures, or infused oils, and it is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
